kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Matilda's levy is at least 2 coins more than the artisan in Highrow.
Either Godfrey goes with Southgate, or Kingsford goes with 18 coins — but not both.
Wulfric, Kingsford, and Oldwall go with 8 coins, 14 coins, and 18 coins, in some order.
Wulfric's levy is higher than both Cedric and Edmund.
At least one of Beatrix, Godfrey, and Wulfric belongs to the Gate Ward.
Wulfric's levy is at least 6 coins away from the artisan in Kingsford.
Edmund goes with either 8 coins or 18 coins.
Godfrey's levy is exactly 6 coins more than the artisan in Riverside.
Highrow goes with at least one of Edmund, 8 coins, or 14 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Royce's weight is at least 2 lb more than the angler at Foxglen.
Either Mabel goes with Willowmere, or Grayreach goes with 14 lb — but not both.
Wade, Grayreach, and Pinehollow go with 4 lb, 10 lb, and 14 lb, in some order.
Wade's weight is higher than both Cody and Dale.
At least one of Boone, Mabel, and Wade belongs to the West Watershed.
Wade's weight is at least 6 lb away from the angler at Grayreach.
Dale goes with either 4 lb or 14 lb.
Mabel's weight is exactly 6 lb more than the angler at Stillwater.
Foxglen goes with at least one of Dale, 4 lb, or 10 lb.
